title: Implement file ingestion, chunking, and deduplication for memory
description: Extend the memory backend with file ingestion for markdown/text/json/csv inputs, chunking rules, and same-namespace deduplication by embedding distance so migration and spec ingestion are idempotent.
acceptance_criteria: `ingest_file()` supports the file types named in the spec.
Markdown heading and paragraph chunking rules are implemented with oversized chunk fallback.
Re-ingesting semantically identical content in the same namespace skips duplicates using the specified distance rule.
`ingest_file()` returns the number of inserted chunks and is suitable for both spec ingestion and migration flows.
